steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to explain what chapter 1 specifically covers. The notes state that chapter 1 outlines the origins and use of the term nostalgia — so the correct choice must reference that content and only that chapter.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Literary theorist Svetlana Boym outlines the origins and use of the term nostalgia in chapter 1 of her book.: directly matches what the notes say chapter 1 covers. ✓
  • Choice B — As Svetlana Boym writes in the seventeenth chapter of her book, "The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection.": draws from a different chapter's content, not chapter 1. ✗
  • Choice C — After outlining the origins and use of the term nostalgia, Svetlana Boym goes on to discuss various skeptics' takes on the concept of nostalgia.: combines content from several chapters rather than focusing on chapter 1 alone. ✗
  • Choice D — Svetlana Boym's The Future of Nostalgia explores the concept of nostalgia from various angles.: describes the book's overall argument instead of what chapter 1 specifically covers. ✗
That is the correct answer.
